name: wb-compare

expect.error: countries must be array of 2-10 ISO-3 codes
countries must be array of 2-10 ISO-3 codes
all countries must be 3-letter ISO codes
indicator must be a World Bank code or alias

_note: Compares one indicator across 2-10 countries via the World Bank. Every fuzz_case lands on a PRE-NETWORK validation branch (count range, ISO-3 shape, missing indicator, non-code indicator), so NO outbound call is made. NEVER no_db (no DB).
